name: Text Sensor.Nextion → Publish
description: You can also publish a state to a Nextion text sensor from elsewhere in your YAML file with the `text_sensor.nextion.publish` action.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the Nextion text sensor.

config_entries.label: Publish State
config_entries.description: Publish new state to Home Assistant. Default is true.

config_entries.label: Send To Nextion
config_entries.description: Publish new state to Nextion display which will update component. Default is true.
